# RPG House Low-Res Remix

- Creator: knekko
- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/rpg-house-low-res-remix
- Downloaded file: `rpg-house-sprites-lowres.png`
- License: Creative Commons Zero 1.0 (`CC0`)
- Attribution: not required; credit is appreciated
- Intended project use: temporary district-building sprites
- Reviewed: 2026-07-18

The OpenGameArt source page identifies this remix as being based on the RPG
house artwork by Angel:
https://opengameart.org/content/rpg-house

Both the original and remix pages release their downloadable files under CC0.
Preserve this source record with the imported image.
